evidence: standards/enterprise/performance-resilience.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A memory-budget exception records the exact scenario, peak/steady measurement, affected devices, bounded compensating control, owner, expiry, and remediation plan; unbounded growth is never permitted.
statement: Memory-intensive journeys MUST declare representative peak and steady-state budgets, bound caches and collections, and release scoped resources deterministically.
